scripts.deploy: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$envPath = Join-Path (Get-Location) '.env'; if (Test-Path $envPath) { Get-Content $envPath | ForEach-Object { if ($_ -match '^\s*#' -or $_ -match '^\s*$') { return }; $parts = $_ -split '=', 2; if ($parts.Length -eq 2) { [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable($parts[0].Trim(), $parts[1].Trim(), 'Process') } } }; & .\node_modules\.bin\hexo.cmd deploy"
